title: Netflix raises US prices once more — what does this mean for viewers?
summary: Netflix has increased subscription prices in the United States for the second time in under two years, raising costs across all plans. The move reflects broader industry pressures and a push to boost revenue amid slowing subscriber growth.

summary: Effective 2 April, the new US pricing will set the standard Sony PlayStation 5 at $649.99, up from $549.99.

title: Sharp launches India's first window AC with active air purification: Check price, specs, and features
summary: Sharp has launched the Ryohu-FS fixed-speed window ACs with capacities from 1.41 to 1.70 tons. The new window AC lineup comes with a 5-year warranty with prices starting at ₹34,490 in India.

title: Google employees are flocking to ‘Agent Smith’ AI tool to automate coding tasks from their phones: Report
summary: Google employees are using a new AI tool named Agent Smith which automates tasks like coding. The popularity of the new tool has led Google to restrict has led to restricted access by the company .

title: Meet Claude Mythos: Anthropic accidentally leaks unreleased AI model with severe cybersecurity risks
summary: Anthropic's upcoming AI model, Claude Mythos, was leaked due to a ‘human error’. The leaked blog also revealed a new AI tier, Capybara, which could sit above the Claude Opus tier.&nbsp;

summary: WhatsApp's latest update has introduced some new features like dual accounts on iOS, cross-platform chat transfer, and improved storage management. The company also now allows users to manage large files in specific chats and take adavantage of Meta AI for photo editing and writing suggestions

title: Samsung launches Galaxy Book6 series in India with Nvidia RTX 5070 graphics and on-device AI: Price, specs and more
summary: Samsung launched its Galaxy Book6 series in India with Intel Core Ultra processors, LPDDR5X RAM, and up to 1TB storage.. The flagship Galaxy Book6 Ultra includes specs like a Touch AMOLED display and NVIDIA GPU.

title: Redmi 15A 5G with 120Hz display and 6300mAh battery launched in India, price starts at ₹12,999
summary: Xiaomi has launched the Redmi 15A 5G in India with a 6,300mAh battery, 120Hz display, and support for various 5G bands. The phone starts at a price of ₹12,999 and will be available to buy from 3 April.

title: AI's arrival complicates Big Tech climate goals, and some worry it's locking in more fossil fuels
summary: AI-driven data center expansion is derailing Big Tech’s climate goals. Despite record renewable purchases, emissions at companies like Google, Amazon, Microsoft and Meta have surged. Power shortages, policy shifts and urgent AI demand are increasing reliance on fossil fuels, especially natural gas.

summary: AI data center startup Crusoe said on Friday it ​will build a ​new 900-megawatt campus to run artificial intelligence workloads for ​Microsoft in Texas, as tech companies aggressively expand generative AI capacity. title: Yahoo turns to AI-powered answer engine Scout to lead it back it its roots in online search
summary: Yahoo is exploring technology's next frontier with Scout, an answer engine powered by artificial intelligence. Scout seems insightful, based on its response to a question posed by The Associated Press about why one of Silicon Valley's brightest stars faded away a decade ago.

title: Facebook takes down Satheesan interview after Kerala police notice

title: RBI fines Pine Labs Rs 3.1 lakh for KYC lapses on prepaid payment instruments
summary: The move follows a statutory inspection of the fintech’s operations conducted between July 2024 and May 2025. The RBI clarified that the action is due to regulatory compliance lapses and does not affect the validity of any transactions or agreements between Pine Labs and its customers.
